locked.master_promise_source: Value Props v2 Part 2 — say it once, everywhere

copy.hero_eyebrow: For Riverside Family Mediation · a JusticeX founding partner
copy.hero_title: Take more matters. Keep your judgment at the center.
copy.lead: An objective, symmetric intake and comparison behind every Riverside matter — so your table starts from a shared, neutral picture, and your neutral judgment goes where it counts.
copy.substance: JusticeX handles the symmetric intake, the citation-grounded financial comparison, and the gap analysis, so you arrive with an organized, even-handed picture and spend time where a neutral is irreplaceable — more matters per neutral, faster intake-to-comparison, a defensible record. You stay in control of who leads, by matter or by step; the platform never decides — it prepares.
copy.tier2_frame: JusticeX prepares; the professional decides. Objective comparison, not a competing forum.
copy.master_promise: Both parties reach Riverside on the same honest picture, so the session starts where judgment matters. Truth · Fairness · Efficiency.
proof_points: A founding-partner hybrid: revenue at signing, decoupled from real-matter readiness.
A retrospective parallel-test pilot on your own closed, de-identified matters.
New York's Community Dispute Resolution Centers help 75,000+ New Yorkers a year, with 70% of mediations held reaching a mutual agreement (NY Courts, CDRCP).

example_matter.body: Two parties, one identical process. JusticeX summarizes each side to the same depth, then lays convergence and divergence side by side — objectively, with citations — for your session.

disclosure_block.standing_line: AI-assisted overviews · figures illustrative · not legal advice.
disclosure_block.keeps_this_honest: JusticeX is software for the objective comparison of legal disputes — not a law firm, lawyer, mediator, or arbitrator. It does not give legal advice, interpret the law, recommend a settlement, or predict an outcome. The people, with the professionals they choose, decide; court access is preserved.
disclosure_block.coverage_statement: Live today: two-party objective comparison for NY divorce & custody. Family and commercial breadth is roadmap.

gemini_notebook_brief.subject: How an objective, citation-grounded comparison lets a mediator take more matters without lowering their standard of care (NY divorce & custody).

higgsfield_brief.art_direction: Documentary, monochrome-leaning, calm; hexagon motif; a neutral mediation table rendered abstractly — no faces, no gavel.
higgsfield_brief.negative_constraints: no fabricated human faces; no scales/gavel/courtroom; no stock handshakes; no off-palette

avatar.disclosure: AI-assisted presenter — shown at first exposure (EU AI Act Art. 50).

governance.notes: Pilot surface (wave-2 design-partner). Proves the recipe. Note: employer/Sponsoring-Org benefit is the primary near-term GTM spine per Value Props v2 §2.4.5; mediators are the Tier-1 design-partner path.
